missing.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Essence scales with how many source tools you’ve tended.
missing.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Sage spells unlock when you make progress in OTHER STEM Lab tools — Space Explorer, Math Lab, RoadReady, and more. Each spell is a retrieval-practice ability: you cast by answering a question from that tool's domain.
missing.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: scroll down to "Yet to discover" and click any spell's
missing.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: button. That'll take you to the tool that unlocks it.
missing.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot is watching your progress everywhere. Even a single mission, problem, or drill in another tool will start unlocking spells here.
missing.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Open Study Hall — untimed practice mode
missing.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Untimed drill · no damage · full explanations
missing.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI scaffolds while learner does most of the cognitive work. Genuine learning + reasonable safety.
missing.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Real learning happens with AI assist. Trade-offs balanced.
missing.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Some learning, some risk. Watch for over-reliance creep.
missing.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: High error cost + low learner effort + AI in the loop = brittle outputs that look correct but fail in production.
missing.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI doing all the work. Learner gets answer but no understanding. Skills atrophy or never develop.
missing.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 AI Workload Inquiry — Who Is Doing The Thinking?
missing.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Set AI assistance level, learner effort, task novelty, and error cost. Predict the learning state. No score, no reveal.
missing.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Your hypothesis (when does AI assist help vs hurt? Where would you draw the line?)
missing.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: e.g., on high-novelty tasks AI is a brainstorm partner; on routine work it short-circuits skill...
missing.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: AI assist + learner effort sums to > 100 — what does over-assist do to learning gain?
missing.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Why does novelty matter for both learning AND risk?
missing.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: When is AI doing 90% of the work actually the right call? (Hint: error cost low, novelty low, time-pressured production.)
missing.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: How would you design a class where AI is allowed but doesn't short-circuit learning?
missing.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: I can explain why this AI/effort/novelty/cost combo yields this state.
missing.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — no score, no reveal, no answer dump. "Learning gain" is a heuristic; real measures need pre/post assessment, transfer tasks, retention checks. AI assist effects vary by domain (creative vs technical vs reflective).
missing.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Equip up to 3 spells. You can only cast equipped spells on this Expedition.
missing.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Pick what fits today. You can change this any expedition. Harder difficulty = bigger essence reward.
missing.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: No presets yet. Build a loadout you like and click "Save current" to keep it for next time.
missing.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Static questions never run out — Gemini generates fresh ones on top.
missing.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ AI-generated questions can be wrong (even the marked answer) — if one looks off, tell your teacher.
missing.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Research: specific goals improve performance + focus. Pick any.
missing.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Land a CRITICAL cast (correct + under 6 seconds) to interrupt and reduce the damage.
missing.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 Calibrated: you said you knew it — and you did.
missing.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Overconfident: felt sure but missed. Worth a second look in Study Hall.
missing.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Lucky guess — but maybe you knew more than you thought!
missing.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Self-aware: you flagged the doubt, and the doubt was right. Add to Review.
missing.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: AI-generated question — the marked answer could be wrong. If it looks off, tell your teacher.
missing.accuracy_by_stated_confidence_well_cal: Accuracy by stated confidence; well-calibrated bars rise from Guessing to Knew it.
missing.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Re-study what you got wrong. Mark "Got it now" once you understand.
missing.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: What is ONE thing you learned or noticed this run? (Writing it strengthens memory more than just thinking it.)
missing.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: e.g., "The bee/flower question keeps tripping me up — mutualism = both benefit"
missing.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Spend essence to deepen the runes of each spell. Higher levels = more base damage + bigger crits.
missing.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: No spells to upgrade yet. Unlock spells by playing other STEM Lab tools.
missing.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Untimed practice. No HP. No damage. Just retrieval + explanations. Failed questions resurface sooner.
missing.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: No spells unlocked yet. Play other STEM Lab tools to unlock spells, then come back here to practice.
missing.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: No questions in the review queue. Either you haven't played enough yet, or you're crushing it. Try Study Hall for low-stakes practice, or launch an expedition.
missing.question: ❓ Question
missing.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Cast each spell at least 3 times to see your strongest.
missing.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: No weak spots flagged yet. Keep casting!
missing.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: When you say you "know it" and you do — that's calibration. Mismatch (over/under-confidence) is the hidden cost in learning.
missing.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: No reflections saved yet. After each expedition, write one thing you noticed or learned. Future you will thank present you.
